description: Final batch: backend error system, package.json, test files, scripts, scratch files, and frontend UI/auth components.

nodes.label: package.json (backend)
nodes.description: Backend project manifest — Fastify 5, BullMQ, ioredis, pg, playwright, tesseract.js, zod. Defines dev/test/build scripts.

nodes.label: AppError.ts
nodes.description: Base error class extending Error with statusCode, code, and optional field. All app errors inherit from this.

nodes.label: AuthError.ts
nodes.description: AuthError (401), ForbiddenError (403), SessionNotFoundError (401) — authentication/authorization error classes.

nodes.label: ValidationError.ts
nodes.description: ValidationError (400) — used throughout modules for input validation failures.

nodes.label: error-handler.ts
nodes.description: Fastify error handler middleware. Handles AppError, Fastify validation errors, rate-limit (429), ZodError, and unhandled (500) with structured JSON responses.

nodes.label: errors/
nodes.description: Error hierarchy: AppError base → AuthError, ForbiddenError, SessionNotFoundError, ValidationError + error-handler middleware.

nodes.label: scripts/
nodes.description: CLI utility scripts: migrate.ts, seed.ts, generate-openapi.ts, import-gujarat-csv.ts, complete-seed.mjs, list_tables.mjs, upgrade-redis.ps1.

nodes.label: migrate.ts
nodes.description: Database migration runner script.

nodes.label: seed.ts
nodes.description: Database seeding script.

nodes.label: generate-openapi.ts
nodes.description: OpenAPI spec generation script.

nodes.label: import-gujarat-csv.ts
nodes.description: Imports Gujarat FPS CSV data into the system.

nodes.label: scratch/
nodes.description: Ad-hoc inspection scripts for external portal scraping: inspect-captcha.js, inspect-ipds.js, inspect-portal.js, inspect-post-login.js.

nodes.label: tests/
nodes.description: Test suites: unit (7 files), integration (7 files), fixtures (2 files).

nodes.label: circuit-breaker.test.ts
nodes.description: Unit tests for circuit breaker pattern.

nodes.label: efps-sync-captcha.test.ts
nodes.description: Unit tests for eFPS sync captcha handling.

nodes.label: efps-sync-mappings.test.ts
nodes.description: Unit tests for eFPS sync field mappings.

nodes.label: encrypt.test.ts
nodes.description: Unit tests for encryption utilities.

nodes.label: hash.test.ts
nodes.description: Unit tests for hashing utilities.

nodes.label: otp.test.ts
nodes.description: Unit tests for OTP generation/verification.

nodes.label: pagination.test.ts
nodes.description: Unit tests for pagination utilities.

nodes.label: audit.test.ts
nodes.description: Integration tests for audit module.

nodes.label: auth.test.ts
nodes.description: Integration tests for auth module.

nodes.label: commission.test.ts
nodes.description: Integration tests for commission module.

nodes.label: finance.test.ts
nodes.description: Integration tests for finance module.

nodes.label: internal-sync.test.ts
nodes.description: Integration tests for internal-sync module.

nodes.label: sync.test.ts
nodes.description: Integration tests for sync module.

nodes.label: transaction.test.ts
nodes.description: Integration tests for transaction module.

nodes.label: factories.ts
nodes.description: Test data factories for creating mock entities.

nodes.label: setup.ts
nodes.description: Test setup/teardown utilities (database, mocks).

nodes.label: modules/
nodes.description: 21 backend feature modules: admin, ads, audit, auth, beneficiary, commission, dashboard, dealer, directory, enterprise-sync, finance, hierarchy, internal-sync, lifting, mdm, notification, report, stock-entry, stock, sync, transaction.

nodes.label: Button.tsx
nodes.description: Reusable button UI component.

nodes.label: Card.tsx
nodes.description: Card container UI component.

nodes.label: DonutChart.tsx
nodes.description: Donut chart visualization UI component.

nodes.label: EmptyState.tsx
nodes.description: Empty state placeholder UI component.

nodes.label: ErrorState.tsx
nodes.description: Error state display UI component.

nodes.label: LoadingScreen.tsx
nodes.description: Full-page loading screen UI component.

nodes.label: Skeleton.tsx
nodes.description: Skeleton loading placeholder UI component.

nodes.label: ui/
nodes.description: 7 reusable UI primitives: Button, Card, DonutChart, EmptyState, ErrorState, LoadingScreen, Skeleton.

nodes.label: AuthCard.tsx
nodes.description: Auth flow card wrapper component.

nodes.label: BackLink.tsx
nodes.description: Back navigation link for auth pages.

nodes.label: FormInput.tsx
nodes.description: Form input field for auth forms.

nodes.label: OtpInput.tsx
nodes.description: OTP input component for multi-digit code entry.

nodes.label: PasswordField.tsx
nodes.description: Password input with visibility toggle.

nodes.label: ProgressStepper.tsx
nodes.description: Multi-step progress indicator for auth flow.

nodes.label: SubmitButton.tsx
nodes.description: Auth form submit button with loading state.

nodes.label: auth/
nodes.description: 7 auth-specific components: AuthCard, BackLink, FormInput, OtpInput, PasswordField, ProgressStepper, SubmitButton.

nodes.label: package-lock.json (backend)
nodes.description: Exists but was skipped per instructions (too large).

nodes.label: No errors/index.ts barrel export
nodes.description: No index.ts barrel file found in errors/; individual error files are imported directly (e.g. import { AuthError } from '../errors/AuthError.js').
